title: Paramount says Warner Bros. acquisition would be an ‘accelerant’ for its turnaround strategy
author: Lukas I. Alpert
fullText: Paramount saw losses rise in its latest quarter, while revenue and streaming subscribers grew in the first full reporting period since its merger with Skydance.
summary: Paramount saw losses rise in its latest quarter, while revenue and streaming subscribers grew in the first full reporting period since its merger with Skydance.
